full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Listing three key assumptions with violation scenarios and paper references
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What are the three key assumptions of the Latent Structural SVM? Include why the loss must not depend on h*_i(w), violation scenarios, and paper references.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Structured assumptions with violation scenarios and Section 3 refs.

top_5_prompts.prompt: What are the three key assumptions of the Latent Structural SVM (Yu & Joachims 2009)?
Why must the loss Δ not depend on the latent variable h*_i(w) of the correct label?
What is the violation scenario if the loss depended on h*_i(w)?
Explain the convex-concave structure assumption and its role in CCCP.
Which paper section and equation cite for tractability of latent completion?

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Part B.
